reviews.comment:
La atención en el comedor , full, servicompras o como lo llamen deja en este viajero la sensación de desgano, siendo socio y recorriendo todo el país está gana en suciedades totales en los baños no siendo muy detallista al estar en ruta muchas horas , creo que una de las YPF ACA muy por debajo del umbral, la playa desbordada comprensible por ser temporada, no me pudieron hacer descuento , plateros atentos

(Translated by Google)
The service in the dining area, the convenience store, or whatever they call it, leaves this traveler with a feeling of apathy. Being a member and traveling all over the country, this is a huge plus. The bathrooms are filthy, and I'm not very observant given how long I've been on the road. I think one of the YPF ACA stations is way below standard. The beach was overflowing, understandably, given it's peak season. They couldn't give me a discount. The silver-plate attendants were inattentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMFluZVJ3EAE
